summary: sys-info-cli-app exfiltrates host information to hardcoded attacker endpoint
details: The package's collect.js gathers host identifiers (os.hostname(), os.homedir()) and other system/filesystem information using the os, fs, child_process, http, and https modules, then POSTs the collected data to the hardcoded external endpoint http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The destination is unrelated to any documented sys-info utility purpose and is fixed in the source rather than being a configurable parameter, matching the structural fingerprint of a host-information beacon to attacker-controlled infrastructure. Installing or invoking this package causes installer host metadata to be transmitted to a third-party server.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
